findings.summary: Debian 13 AppArmor 4.1 denies unix stream socket creation under docker-default; installed corrected profile at /etc/apparmor.d/docker-default on the host
dockerRunner.ts job out/ dir not writable by non-root runner user on stock Linux daemons; chmod 0o777 fix applied to working tree (uncommitted) and deployed
run_smoke.sh had the same out-dir permission bug; fixed in working tree (uncommitted)
Docker installed directly on the Proxmox node per user request; ~5.5 GB RAM headroom with VMs running
